_provenance: Captured from live alphabot_state.db (read-only) 2026-06-04 — last shadow_history row per (symphony_id, trading_day) across ALL position epochs. Symphony ids truncated to the 12-char prefix the DATA-CORRECTNESS-AUDIT uses. These are REAL recorded (shadow_return, current_return) pairs, NOT synthetic. Epoch labels preserve the real multi-epoch structure: each symphony's trigger-day divergence lives in an OLD epoch; the latest epoch is a fresh post-reset 1-day window with zero divergence (database.py wipe_transient_state at the 06-04 open).
_purpose: AC-1 cross-epoch (LIFETIME) Guard Alpha, EPOCH-ADDITIVE. The current _get_shadow_divergence_trajectory (analytics.py:657-731) scopes the trajectory to the LATEST position_epoch only. For every symphony here the latest epoch is a 1-day window (len < 2 -> trajectory None -> dry_run == if_held -> Guard Alpha 0.00%) OR a multi-day flat window with zero divergence. The guard's REAL recorded effect is stranded in prior epochs. A correct lifetime computation must SUM each epoch's own divergence across ALL epochs (NOT a single global product, which would chain prior-position market returns).

_invariants.never_triggered_zero: n2ooAZTvBR has shadow_return == current_return on EVERY day in EVERY epoch -> lifetime divergence == 0.0 EXACTLY (abs=1e-9). The anchor.
_invariants.triggered_nonzero: iaSOOUsmnC and lW4ZzWuqR8 each have at least one day where shadow_return != current_return in a PRIOR epoch (the guard acted) -> lifetime divergence is genuinely non-zero. The current latest-epoch-only scope reports 0.00% for both -> RED.
_invariants.if_held_unchanged: Chaining divergence across epochs must NOT chain prior-position MARKET returns into if_held. if_held remains the current Composer lifetime simple_return; only the divergence product spans epochs.

_derivation: EPOCH-ADDITIVE (semantic B). For each symphony: lifetime_divergence_pct = SUM over position-epochs E of (PROD_E(1 + shadow_return/100) - PROD_E(1 + current_return/100)) * 100; dry_run = if_held + lifetime_divergence_pct; Guard Alpha = dry_run - if_held = lifetime_divergence_pct. A single GLOBAL product across epochs (semantic A) is WRONG: it multiplies a prior epoch's prod_shadow into later epochs' factors, chaining the prior position's market returns across the reset. The epoch-additive sum measures each position's guard effect in its own frame (an epoch with shadow==current contributes exactly 0). MDD dry_run = peak-to-trough of the bot equity path where divergence accrues within each epoch from its own anchor and the running total carries across boundaries. ALL expected values are DERIVED IN-TEST from these rows by the test helper — none are hardcoded here.

_tolerance.never_triggered: abs=1e-9 — divergence must be identically zero, not approximately
_tolerance.triggered: abs=1e-6 — float arithmetic compounding over 9 days

triggered_iaSOO_saved_in_prior_epochs.description: Genuinely protected symphony. Divergence accrued in EPOCH_A (day 2026-05-21: shadow +2.26 vs current 0.00 -> guard held while market dropped) and EPOCH_B (day 2026-06-03: shadow +0.25 vs current -0.16). EPOCH_C is a 1-day post-reset window with zero divergence -> current code reports 0.00% Guard Alpha. Lifetime divergence is genuinely positive.

triggered_lW4Zz_saved_in_prior_epochs.description: Second genuinely protected symphony. Large prior-epoch divergence (EPOCH_A day 2026-05-21: shadow +2.66 vs current -0.03; day 2026-05-19: shadow +2.83 vs current +1.29) and EPOCH_B day 2026-06-03 (shadow +0.24 vs current 0.00). EPOCH_C is a 1-day flat post-reset window. Current code reports 0.00%.

never_triggered_n2ooA.description: The guard NEVER triggered. shadow_return == current_return on every day in every epoch. Lifetime divergence MUST be exactly 0.0 -> Guard Alpha 0.0000% and MDD dry_run 0.0 -> the anchor invariant that any cross-epoch fix must preserve.
